_note: Feature declares 'Merchant' as the sole actor. Task #10 Gherkin uses 'Admin user' in Given steps. Step 2b (contradiction scan) should surface this Actor mismatch between the Feature spec and the Task Gherkin.

feature.title: Feature: Settlement retry management
feature.body:
## Goal
Merchants can view failed settlements and trigger manual retries from their dashboard.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Merchants can see failed settlements with reason codes in their settlement list
- [ ] Merchants can request a retry for a permanently-failed settlement
- [ ] A retried settlement is re-queued and its status changes to 'pending'

## Domain Events
- `SettlementRetryRequested` — emitted when a Merchant requests a retry

## Bounded Context
Settlement domain. Merchant actor. No operator or admin access paths in this feature.

tasks.title: Task: Add settlement retry endpoint
tasks.body:
## Intent
Expose an endpoint that allows retrying a permanently-failed settlement.

## Gherkin
```gherkin
Feature: Settlement retry endpoint

  Scenario: Admin user triggers a settlement retry
    Given an Admin user has access to the settlement management panel
    When the Admin user submits a retry request for settlement #S-123
    Then the SettlementRetryRequested event is emitted
    And the settlement status changes to 'pending'

  Scenario: Admin user cannot retry a settlement in 'pending' status
    Given an Admin user views a settlement in 'pending' status
    When the Admin user attempts to submit a retry
    Then the retry action is rejected
```

## Contracts
- Input: POST /settlements/:id/retry
- Precondition: Settlement must be in 'permanently_failed' status
- Postcondition: SettlementRetryRequested emitted with merchantId and settlementId
